expect: Market continues Friday trajectory. GLD still AGAINST. PRED-0017 directional signal emerges.

bear_market.evidence: SPY +1.30%, QQQ +1.16%, IWM +2.65%, AAPL +1.36%, NVDA +1.85%. All equity indices UP. 0/4 bear predictions working.

safe_haven.evidence: GLD -4.92% from base (accelerating sell-off). TLT +0.47% (barely moving). VIX dropping -5.4% intraday. No flight to safety behavior.

oil_disruption.evidence: S517 showed WTI at $100.83 (+7.78%). XLE +0.52% lagging = market skepticism.

dollar_weakness.evidence: UUP -0.33% today. EEM +2.72% (strongest performer) confirms dollar-weakness tailwind.

rotation_to_value.evidence: IWM +2.65% outperforming QQQ +1.16%. Small caps leading. XLU +0.85%.

key_findings: Bear market thesis is failing — 0/4 equity bear predictions working, all indices green
GLD -4.92% is the worst single-prediction performance — safe haven thesis badly wrong
EEM +2.72% is the best performing prediction — EM/dollar-weakness thesis working
PRED-0017 (1-week bear SPY) needs -3.3% to -6.3% drop in 6 days — increasingly unlikely
Rotation signal: IWM (+2.65%) > SPY (+1.30%) > QQQ (+1.16%) — value > growth confirmed

diff: Expected continuation: WRONG on equities (market rallied). GLD AGAINST: confirmed and worse (-3.06% → -4.92%). PRED-0017 directional signal: YES — AGAINST (SPY up not down). SURPRISE: broad equity rally. VIX dropping sharply (new data point, was NO_DATA at S517).

meta_analysis.calibration_signal: Portfolio is overwhelmingly AGAINST on bearish predictions. The crisis/bear thesis built on Hormuz escalation has not materialized in equity markets. Oil price is up but equity markets are discounting it as temporary. This suggests the swarm's geopolitical-to-market-impact model is too deterministic.

Consider closing PRED-0004 (GLD bull) as FALSIFIED — -4.92% is opposite to +5% target
